title: Review: address P0-P3 review findings from sixth round
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — one real correctness issue (thundering herd) only matters under high concurrency; one RFC compliance gap that is benign in practice. No P0 or P1 findings.
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not audit all backend error-code mappings exhaustively; (2) thundering-herd fix complexity not evaluated. Would raise confidence if: CachingStore thundering-herd is either fixed or explicitly documented as a known limitation with a note in the crate-level doc.
